full_text:
Chen Xiu 陳脩
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Chen Xiu (陳脩)was born in Lujiang. Like his father, kept his unruly troops under control. Chen Xiu was affiliated with the Wu Kingdom. Chen Xiu lived during the Three Kingdoms period of Chinese history.
